exercises.title: Build a Business Card
exercises.description: Create an HTML page that displays a business card with: name, job title, email (as a mailto link), phone number, and a profile image. Use semantic tags.
hints:
Use

for the name,

for job title

exercises.title: Create a Navigation Menu
exercises.description: Build a horizontal navigation bar with 4 links: Home, About, Projects, Contact. Wrap it in a <nav> element.
hints: Use an unordered list <ul> with <li> items

exercises.title: Build a Contact Form
exercises.description: Create a form with fields for: name, email, subject (dropdown), and message (textarea). Include a submit button and proper labels.

solution.code:
<form action='/submit' method='POST'>
  <label for='name'>Name:</label>
  <input type='text' id='name' name='name' required>
  <label for='email'>Email:</label>
  <input type='email' id='email' name='email' required>
  <label for='subject'>Subject:</label>
  <select id='subject' name='subject'>
    <option value='general'>General</option>
    <option value='support'>Support</option>
  </select>
  <label for='message'>Message:</label>
  <textarea id='message' name='message' required></textarea>
  <button type='submit'>Send</button>
</form>
